objective: Produce an auditable trail whose declared hash re-derives exactly, so a third party can replay and verify the run.
prompt: Complete the task and emit an audit trail: an ordered list of step records, plus a declared audit_hash equal to the SHA-256 (canonical JSON) of that trail. Include the ordered step ids.
hard_constraints: audit_hash must equal the canonical SHA-256 of audit_trail.
The trail must include steps s1, s2, s3 in order.

replay_requirements.notes: The scorer recomputes the audit hash from the declared trail and compares.
